CustomField.description: If a Constituent is referenced, pulls the information from the Constituent record. If a Constituent is not referenced, display what was entered in the text field.
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__r.Phone ))),
(Constituent__r.Phone &BR() &
"Phone Type - " & CASE(Constituent__r.ucinn_ascendv2__Preferred_Phone_Type__c,
'B','Business', 'H','Home', 'M','Mobile', 'O','Other', 'Z','Business Cell Phone', 'Y','Business Phone Only', 'Other')),
IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__c )),(ISBLANK( Constituent__r.Phone ))),
"No Preferred Phone",
IF(ISBLANK(Constituent__c ),
(Phone_Number__c &BR() & "Phone Type - "& TEXT(Phone_Type__c)), "" )))
CustomField.label: Phone and Type
